items.question: What is Node.js?
options: a JavaScript runtime built on V8
items.answer: a JavaScript runtime built on V8
items.explanation: It runs JavaScript outside the browser.

items.question: Which enables ES Modules in a Node project?
items.explanation: That (or a .mjs extension) switches Node to ESM.

items.question: How do you read an environment variable in Node?
items.explanation: process.env exposes environment variables in Node.

items.question: Why can a CPU-heavy task harm a Node server?
options: it blocks the single-threaded event loop
items.answer: it blocks the single-threaded event loop
items.explanation: Blocking the loop stalls all concurrent requests.
